calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2018 Continued To Jun-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings not reported.

Alisa Kim, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau,
No appearance by defaulted defendant ALIPHCOM, A Corporation DBA Jawbone ADBA ALIPH,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness: Tanya Maslennikov sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $104,977.39
Pre-Judgment Interest: $22,830.43
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $508.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $131,141.72

Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Continued To May-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
